description.value:
Prerequisite: Dodge, base attack bonus +6.

Benefit: The Fleeting Foot feat enables the use of three tactical maneuvers. Negate Power Attack: If a foe designated with your Dodge feat uses the Power Attack feat against you, the foe gains no bonus on the damage roll but still takes the corresponding penalty on the attack roll. Diverting Defense: You must be flanked. The first attack of the round from the opponent designated with your Dodge feat automatically misses you and may strike the other flanking foe instead (the attacking creature makes an attack roll normally, and its ally is considered flat-footed). Cause Overreach: When you provoke an attack of opportunity from a foe by moving out of a threatened square and that foe misses you, you can make a free trip attempt against this foe; the foe does not get a chance to trip you if your attempt fails.
